subtasks.title: Implement confidence score formula
subtasks.details: Combine technical, volume, OI, Greeks, and liquidity components into final score with configurable weights.
questions: Default starting weights for each component?

subtasks.title: Create top-5 CE/PE finder
subtasks.details: Rank all valid strikes and output top 5 calls and puts with tie-break by volume, OI change, ATM proximity.

subtasks.title: Build liquidity trap classifier
subtasks.details: Detect bull/bear traps using OI clusters, sweep patterns, gamma concentration, and sudden reversals.
acceptance_criteria: Alert payload includes trap_type, trigger_factors, confidence.
questions: Minimum evidence count before emitting trap alert?

subtasks.title: Persist ranking outputs
subtasks.details: Store scores and ranking snapshots in s004_strike_scores with cycle timestamp and model version.
acceptance_criteria: Historical rank replay possible for audits.
questions: Required retention period for ranking snapshots?
